project.name: Preventli
project.description: Claims, compliance, and return-to-work management system for WorkSafe Victoria

constraints: Must comply with WorkSafe Victoria regulations
All state-changing endpoints require CSRF protection
JWT tokens must be short-lived (15 min)
Never store secrets in code or version control

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: JWT-based login, logout, role-based access (admin, employer, clinician, insurer)

features.name: Worker Cases Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard showing all worker cases with filtering and search

features.name: Freshdesk Sync
features.description: Synchronize tickets from Freshdesk into worker cases

features.name: Medical Certificates
features.description: Track medical certificates with compliance checking

features.name: Case Detail Panel
features.description: Detailed view of individual worker cases

features.name: AI Case Summaries
features.description: Claude-powered intelligent case summaries

features.name: Case Timeline
features.description: Chronological event history for cases

features.name: Recovery Chart
features.description: Visual recovery timeline with certificate history

features.name: Action Queue
features.description: Task management for case actions (chase certificates, follow-ups)

features.name: Termination Workflow
features.description: Multi-step termination of employment process

features.name: Transcript Ingestion
features.description: Auto-ingest discussion transcripts from files

features.name: Email Draft Generation
features.description: AI-powered email drafts for case communications

features.name: Notification System
features.description: Automated alerts for certificate expiry, overdue actions

features.name: User Invites
features.description: Secure invite-based user registration

features.name: Webhook Handlers
features.description: Secure webhook endpoints for external integrations

features.name: Clinical Evidence Evaluation
features.description: Evaluate clinical evidence completeness for cases

features.name: Compliance AI Assistant
features.description: Claude-powered compliance Q&A assistant

features.name: Security Middleware
features.description: CSRF, rate limiting, helmet headers

features.name: Multi-Tenant Isolation
features.description: Organization-level data isolation to prevent cross-tenant data access
acceptanceCriteria: Users can only access cases in their organization
Migration 0009 applies organizationId to all tables
features.notes: Implemented 2025-12-16. Code complete and pushed. Migration pending.

features.name: Close Case
features.description: Close worker cases with optional reason, syncs with Freshdesk

features.name: Compliance Override
features.description: Manually override compliance status with reason

features.name: Ticket Merge
features.description: Merge multiple Freshdesk tickets into single master ticket

features.name: Employer Dashboard
features.description: Simplified dashboard for employer role users

features.name: Reports & Analytics
features.description: Reports page with compliance and work status charts

features.name: Workers Normalized Table
features.description: Normalized workers table with FK linkage to cases, assessments, and bookings

features.name: Alex Chat Widget
features.description: Floating Talk with a Doctor FAB on all authenticated pages; soul loaded from DR_ALEX_SOUL.md

features.name: Book Telehealth Modal
features.description: Header button opens context-aware booking modal; inline in chat when AI suggests it

features.name: Pre-Employment Magic Link Flow
features.description: Assessment create, send via email, public /check/:token questionnaire, no auth required

features.name: AI Report Generation + Alerts
features.description: Claude Haiku generates clearance report; auto-emails employer or alerts jacinta@preventli.ai

features.name: Worker Profile Page
features.description: Full worker history page at /workers/:id showing assessments, cases, and bookings

resolved.name: Medical Certificate Webhook Processing
resolved.resolution: Implemented handleMedicalCertificateForm with worker name matching, restriction parsing, and certificate creation

resolved.name: RTW Plan Webhook Processing
resolved.resolution: Implemented handleReturnToWorkForm with clinical status updates and functional capacity tracking

resolved.name: Remove Debug Tokens in Production
resolved.resolution: Tokens now only returned when NODE_ENV !== 'production'

resolved.name: Multi-Tenant Data Isolation Security Vulnerability
resolved.resolution: Implemented comprehensive organizationId filtering across all storage methods, routes, and services. Created requireCaseOwnership() middleware, audit logging system, and migration 0009. Users can now only access cases within their organization. Admins retain cross-tenant access. All access denials logged. Commit: 2b58b57
resolved.impact: Critical - Prevented cross-organization data access vulnerability
